Username must be 3-16 characters!: Ishina lya muntu lilingile ukuba ne fishibilo 3-16!
Password must contain at least one upper: Ishiwi lya kwingililapo lilingile ukuba ne cikomo cimo icakulisha!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Ishiwi lya kwingililapo lilingile ukuba ne fishibilo 8-16!
Password must contain at least one symbo: Ishiwi lya kwisalilako lilingile ukuba ne cishibilo cimo!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Ubutali bwa Ishina lya Mubomfi Bufwile Ukuba Pakati ka 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Ubutali bwa Ishiwi lya Kucingilila Bufwile Ukuba Pakati ka 8-16
Password must contain at least one lower: Ishiwi lya kwingililapo lilingile ukuba ne lembo limo ilinono!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Ishiwi lya kwingililapo lilingile ukuba ne nambala imo!
